label: Protecting Porcupine Mountains and opposing Copperwood Mine

comments.text: The petition to fling Brandon Beane into Lake Erie via trebuchet has 80,000 signatures

This is my home. Please take a minute to look at the site and sign the petition below.
You'll understand why we want to preserve this land and Lake Superior. Thank you! Please repost?
#ProtectthePorkies
1/2 protecttheporkies.com/home

For those in the US. Write your representatives about opposing a foreign company's plan to erect the closest metallic sulfide waste facility to Lake Superior in history. protecttheporkies.com/home #ProtectThePorkies #PorcupineMountains #Michigan #LakeSuperior

Please watch this video, when you have a few minutes, share, and subscribe to our YouTube channel! #MIStateParks #protecttheporkies #cancelcopperwood #lakesuperior #theporkies #upperpeninsula #michigan #greatlakes youtu.be/cz8t1im34t4?...
